description: variant swap plus block exclusion assembles the right document

input._fixture: saved fictional vetted contract template with a usage_rights variant group and a default-on exclusivity block; deal grants paid usage, no exclusivity

assertions: the paid-usage variant text is present and the organic-only variant text is absent
the exclusivity block text is absent and selection_rationale states why
the RESEARCH NOTES banner is document_text line 1 and ready_to_sign is false

description: a missing profile field stays bracketed, gapped, and mirrored to profile_gaps

input._fixture: profile with legal_name set and governing_law_state null

assertions: gaps and profile_gaps both name governing_law_state with a recommended next step

description: structurally invalid selection aborts with errors, no document

input._fixture: selections including both members of the usage_rights variant group

assertions: selection_errors is non-empty and names the variant group
document_text is null; nothing partial is emitted
the atom proposes a corrected selection for the human instead of silently fixing it

description: no saved template: report and point at the ingestion path
assertions: the atom reports the missing template and points at template-ingest and the committed starters
nothing is assembled from thin air
